title: Why the initial statement of a for loop is not seen outside of the loop?

features.name: always block triggered by integer loop variables
features.description: Code should include an always block with sensitivity list @(i, j) where i and j are integer loop variables modified in a concurrent initial block with nested for loops

features.name: nested for loops with integer variables and inner delay
features.description: Code should include nested for loops using integer loop variables with a #1 delay inside the inner loop body

features.name: integer variable cross-block scheduling between initial and always
features.description: Code should include integer variables that are assigned in an initial block and read in an always block with sensitivity list, where scheduling of the variable updates causes inconsistent sampling
